layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout: one asset per column, attribute labels down the left (EIF; SP, DC, JT; Stock Name; Ticker; Transaction; Value of Asset A-L + Spouse/DC; Type of Income; Amount of Income A-K + Spouse/DC). Selections are black-filled cells. Footer group label: 'MS MR Trust Partnership'. Single Amount of Income block on this page. The entire Transaction row is one continuous black band across all three asset columns (no letter visible) - treated as a divider/redaction, transaction recorded as null.
